untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) '20+ day base' consolidation phase - not directly measurable without custom pattern recognition; (2) 'fundamental catalyst event occurred within last 2 trading days' - external event detection not available in indicator set; (3) Price below base support - requires identified support level from pattern history. The volume confirmation and MA crossover are translatable, but the core logic (catalyst detection + base identification) cannot be expressed using allowed indicators alone.
translation_notes: Partial translation captures the technical components: MA50 crossover with volume confirmation (vol_ratio_20 > 1.5). Missing critical components: (a) catalyst event detection (requires external data/event feed), (b) base formation detection (requires pattern memory or custom lookback), (c) support level identification. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as signal specifies direction depends on trend direction at time of catalyst. Recommend adding external event flag input or implementing custom base-detection indicator to fully operationalize this signal.
